name: Deluxe Mountain Suite
description: Experience unparalleled luxury in our Deluxe Mountain Suite, featuring panoramic views of the surrounding peaks and valleys. This spacious retreat combines modern elegance with natural warmth, offering a king-size bed with premium linens, a private balcony, marble bathroom with rain shower and soaking tub, and a cozy sitting area perfect for unwinding after a day of exploration.
short_description: Panoramic mountain views with king bed, private balcony, and marble bathroom
amenities: King Bed,Mountain View,Private Balcony,Marble Bathroom,Rain Shower,Soaking Tub,Mini Bar,Smart TV,Wi-Fi,Room Service

name: Premium Garden Room
description: Our Premium Garden Room offers a serene escape surrounded by lush landscaped gardens. Thoughtfully designed with contemporary furnishings, this room features a queen-size bed, private terrace overlooking the gardens, an ensuite bathroom with walk-in shower, and all the modern amenities you need for a comfortable stay.
short_description: Serene garden views with queen bed and private terrace
amenities: Queen Bed,Garden View,Private Terrace,Walk-in Shower,Smart TV,Wi-Fi,Mini Fridge,Air Conditioning

name: Royal Penthouse
description: The crown jewel of Zdrava Resort, our Royal Penthouse spans an expansive living space with floor-to-ceiling windows offering breathtaking 360-degree views. This ultra-premium accommodation features a master bedroom with king bed, separate living and dining areas, private jacuzzi on the terrace, fully stocked bar, butler service, and exclusive access to our VIP lounge.
short_description: Ultra-luxury penthouse with 360-degree views and private jacuzzi
amenities: King Bed,360° Views,Private Jacuzzi,Butler Service,Living Room,Dining Area,Full Bar,VIP Lounge Access,Smart Home,Premium Wi-Fi

name: Spa Wellness Suite
description: Designed for total rejuvenation, our Spa Wellness Suite integrates wellness into every detail. Enjoy an in-room sauna, aromatherapy diffuser, yoga mat and meditation corner, alongside a luxurious king bed and spa-inspired bathroom with chromotherapy shower. Complimentary daily spa treatments are included with your stay.
short_description: Wellness-focused suite with in-room sauna and daily spa treatments
amenities: King Bed,In-Room Sauna,Aromatherapy,Yoga Corner,Chromotherapy Shower,Daily Spa Treatment,Organic Minibar,Smart TV,Wi-Fi

name: Classic Comfort Room
description: Our Classic Comfort Room provides an elegant and affordable retreat with all essential amenities. Featuring a comfortable queen bed, modern ensuite bathroom, work desk, and views of the resort grounds, this room is perfect for travelers seeking quality accommodation with exceptional value.
short_description: Elegant comfort with queen bed and resort views
amenities: Queen Bed,Resort View,Ensuite Bathroom,Work Desk,Smart TV,Wi-Fi,Air Conditioning,Coffee Maker

name: Family Mountain Lodge
description: Perfect for families, our Mountain Lodge offers generous space with two bedrooms, a shared living area, and a fully equipped kitchenette. Enjoy mountain views from your private balcony while the kids play in the dedicated children's corner. The lodge includes family-friendly amenities and easy access to our kids' club.
short_description: Spacious family lodge with two bedrooms and mountain views
amenities: Two Bedrooms,Mountain View,Private Balcony,Kitchenette,Living Area,Kids Corner,Smart TV,Wi-Fi,Washer,Family Amenities
